title: Techoblade Totem
description: It adds A Totem Of Undying to Minecraft that gives Technoblade skin on it.
body:
**Technoblade Totem**

It adds A Totem Of Undying to Minecraft that gives Technoblade skin on it. If your A real Technoblade fan, I suggest using this. And for all the Technoblade fans out there I think you people are amazing. To be honest everyone is cool. And I think it just fits the totem, It's super good.

[Discord](https://discord.gg/hSHggSFTxG)

[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@glaze-irl_yt_vid)
### You're Welcome for the totems.

_Made by glaze_craftmc_
